name: Fruit Freeze
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple in juice, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch square pan.
3. Place the pan in the freezer and freeze for about 2 hours, or until set.
4. Once frozen, remove from the pan and beat the contents with a fork to break up any large ice crystals.
5. Refreeze the mixture before serving.
